title: justicia chachapoyasensis
intro: Justicia chachapoyasensis, also known as Chachapoyan honeyflower or Honey flower, is a flowering plant species in the Acanthaceae family, native to Peru. It possesses medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and potentially exhibiting antioxidant properties, although further research is necessary. Herbal preparations of Justicia chachapoyasensis often involve infusions, decoctions, or topical applications to harness its medicinal and therapeutic benefits.
